description: Value-native map core operations (§59). A [string:int] cell starts [:] empty; two .insert calls add DAL->4500, HOU->5000. The map's observable surface is asserted via derived-scalar projections (impl-neutral: .size, .getOr bracket-fallback-read, .has present/absent) and the rendered DOM. .entries() feeds an <each> producing one <li> per entry. NOTE: the raw map cell snapshots as an impl#1-internal HAMT (asserting it would bake impl internals — D3 impl-freedom), so map values are observed through scalar projections + DOM, never the raw cell. Iteration ORDER is UNSPECIFIED (§59.8) so only the row COUNT is asserted, not order.
rationale: §59.6/§59.7 .insert adds/overwrites (reassignment-canonical), @m[k] / .getOr read (V|not with fallback), .has reports presence, .size is the entry count; §59.8 .entries() is a value-native array feeding <each>. Two inserts -> size 2, DAL present (4500), XXX absent (false).
